one_time_description: Correction of an error added to opening accumulated surplus (Note 19)
economic_notes: GBEs include 672465 B.C. Ltd. (50% drilling rig), Deh Tai Limited Partnership (road construction/site prep), Deh Tai GP Ltd. (hotel/commercial/residential in Fort Nelson), Waterways Communications Limited Partnership (communications for resource companies in Horn River Basin). Loss from investments in First Nation business entities was $2,767,197.
notes: Fiscal year 2020. Comparative 2019 figures are restated due to correction of an error (Note 19). Consolidated entity includes Liard Hotsprings Lodge (FNFN) Ltd., Fort Nelson Indian Band Land Trust Society, and Reaching For Our Vision Trust. Five GBEs accounted for under modified equity method with total losses of $2,767,197. Funds held in trust (Ottawa Trust) of $16,227,332 held by Government of Canada not included in operating cash. Net financial assets of $40,143,510 confirmed from statement of changes in net financial assets. Long-term debt balance and deferred revenue details were cut off in the provided text. TCA net book value not extractable from provided text. Auditor office located in Surrey, BC.
